Pricing

Choose the plan that matches your growth ambition.

AURA combines premium design, AI intelligence, and fast-moving workflows into one confidence-first workspace.

Starter

For lean teams that want polished forecasting and workflow clarity.

$29/mo

  • Unlimited dashboards
  • 3 AI analyses per month
  • Basic data room
  • Email support
Talk to sales

Pro

For growth leaders who need premium insights, collaboration, and reporting.

$129/mo

  • Unlimited analyses
  • Advanced visualizations
  • Notifications & alerts
  • Priority support
Talk to sales

Enterprise

For board-grade operations with private migration and custom domain support.

Custom

  • Custom domain
  • Dedicated onboarding
  • Advanced security
  • SLA-backed support
Talk to sales

Premium insights

Forecast, heatmaps, cohort analysis, and executive storytelling in one workspace.

Team collaboration

Manage invites, team roles, notifications, and secure reporting without context switching.

Enterprise-ready

Premium controls, custom domain simulation, and support designed for scaling decision-making.
